summary: Assemble a structured CEO review or office-hours decision pack with priorities, blockers, and recommended decisions.

inputs.name: review_scope
inputs.description: Topics, decisions, or updates to cover in the review.

inputs.name: blockers_and_risks
inputs.description: Known blockers, risks, or open questions requiring executive input.

inputs.name: metrics_snapshot
inputs.description: Key metrics, KPIs, or progress indicators for the review period.

outputs.name: decision_pack
outputs.description: Prioritized list of decisions needed with recommended actions.

outputs.name: blocker_summary
outputs.description: Blockers with owners, severity, and proposed unblocking steps.

outputs.name: review_notes
outputs.description: Contextual notes and metrics for the review session.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is executive review support, not financial forecasting or legal review.
Require scope and blockers before assembling the pack.
Output must be concise enough for a 30-minute review session.

steps.action: Organize topics into decisions-needed, updates, and discussion items.
Rank blockers by severity and assign proposed owners and unblocking actions.
Verify the pack is complete, concise, and free of stale or duplicated items.
Merge decisions, blockers, and metrics into a single review document.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read status updates, metrics exports, and prior review notes.

verification.method: Check that decisions are ranked by urgency with recommended actions.
Check each blocker has a named owner and proposed next step.
Check the pack fits a 30-minute review window.

success_criteria: The pack separates decisions-needed from status updates.
Every blocker has an owner and a proposed unblocking step.
The output is concise enough for executive consumption without further editing.

rollback.when: If the pack invents metrics or misrepresents blocker status, roll back to raw inputs.
